title: Morgan Kaufmann's Security & Privacy Components in Cloud Computing
description: A visual breakdown of the core security and privacy elements as discussed in Morgan Kaufmann publications, showing their interrelationships in a cloud context.
relationships: Security Policy defines and governs all other elements
CIA Triad forms the foundational security objectives
Cryptographic Controls and Access Control Mechanisms enforce Confidentiality and Integrity
Audit & Accountability ensures compliance and supports Trust
Privacy is protected through controls enforcing Confidentiality and defined by Policy
